title: Opening for Production Engineer at Microtek International

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Microtek International
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
